result.stdout:
Description:
  Update all packages in solution or project(s).

Usage:
  UpdatR.Update.Cli [options]

Options:
  --target <target>                                                  Path to solution or project(s). Exclude if solution or project(s) is in current folder or if project(s) is in subfolders. []
  --verbosity <Critical|Debug|Error|Information|None|Trace|Warning>  Log level [default: Warning]
  --version                                                          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                     Show help and usage information
